name: Escape Together: Secrets of the Professor

reviews.review_description: Even though this game was only 5.00, it was a waste of 5.00. Doesn’t save if you quit the game. Too many glitches. We got into the second room but there was no screen by the back wall that you had to react with. It was just a blank wall. So we couldn’t open the door to get back to the first room. Had to quit, but then we would have to do everything all over again. Very frustrating game

Really excited to play this game with my son. Unfortunately when one player creates a room the other player presses ‘join’ and nothing happens. It will not let you join the game. Hence the one star rating. Maybe the devs can tell me if we’re doing something wrong or correct the glitch.
UPDATE…..thanks to the developers. All working fine now. Great little game for the price.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for bringing this to our attention. 

I can see the multiplayer instructions might have been unclear. Did you type the Room ID before clicking the join button? Use the keyboard in the room to type the Room ID before clicking the join button. The player creating a room will have a random Room ID on the wall after creating a room.

I really hope this helps. And otherwise we are here to help and will do our best to get it sorted

reviews.review_title: A great mystery at a great price!
reviews.review_description:
At great gem of the game at a very decent price.

A lot of people are hesitant at picking some Escape room games because they think that once they are done with the game they will never play it again.

The developer clearly recognizes this and has priced it at more than a fair price (I can't even buy lunch for that price!)

The game is very well made with a number of clever puzzles and an intriguing story line.

Can you figure out the mystery behind the disappearance of the professor?

The game also can be played fully in co op with a friend which actually changes some of the puzzles to accommodate 2 players.

A great game for fans of the genre and even players unfamiliar with the genre (you can't really go wrong at the price!)

Recommended!

developer_response.body:
Could you provide an explanation of the bugs you encountered? The information would be extremely beneficial for us to resolve them effectively.
You can email your response on our website: https://tenitinygames.wixsite.com/ttgames/contactus

reviews.review_description:
For a first title by the developers, this game is a hidden gem!

The rooms are rich with detail, red herrings and of course great puzzles that actually interweave between the rooms too!

There are a whole host of accessibility options that make exploring simple and easy to do - including height adjustment on the fly, storage for items on the wrists and also movement options.

Whether you play this through alone or with friends, I guarantee you will have an amazing experience!

The game threads together through a very immersive story and gives the experience purpose and meaning! Sssh no spoilers!

For replayability your time is recorded and then there is the almost empty bookcase in the main lobby. You will have to see for yourself what that entails.....

Don't miss this one, as far as escape rooms go Escape Together is high up on my list! ❤️

reviews.review_title: Love the mystery but has some glitches
reviews.review_description: Fun game and love the mysteries! Dealing with more glitches then expected and need to restart games when items disappeared.
the riddles are balanced and not very complex and at the same time need to think about comparing the available facts
